expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but different schema: uses subject{}, contracts{}, risk_assessment{} instead of investigation_context, summary{}. Findings use 'F1' string IDs and 'classification' field instead of 'status'. Missing dismissed[] as separate array — dismissed items embedded in findings array.
F1: 'NACE mismatch: consulting firm winning construction contracts'. Evidence lists all contracts as construction/renovation. 'complete category disconnect'.
F2: '1 employee', 'Equity of 51,647 EUR vs. total contract value of 892,261 EUR (17.3x leverage)'. 'cannot physically execute 892K in construction work'.
3 CONFIRMED (F1, F2, F6), 4 INCONCLUSIVE (F3, F4, F8, F10), 3 DISMISSED (F5, F7, F9). All properly classified.
F9 explicitly notes 'foaf.sk shallow scan found 0 cross-supplier connections'. No fabricated data.
Extensive: 892K total, 625,252 EUBA combined, 17.3x leverage, 72.71% debt ratio, 3 concurrent projects. Very thorough.
risk_assessment.overall_risk='HIGH' with confirmed_count/inconclusive_count/dismissed_count. But field is 'risk_assessment' not 'summary', missing key_findings array.
